The Crow (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $9,275,659Details
International Box Office $6,676,825
Worldwide Box Office $15,952,484
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $291,716
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,149,879
Total $1,441,595
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Soulmates Eric and Shelly are brutally murdered when the demons of her dark past catch up with them. Given the chance to save his true love, Eric embarks on a merciless rampage to take revenge on their killers, traversing the worlds of the living and the dead to put the wrong things right.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,644,666 (50.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.00 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,752 opening theaters/2,752 max. theaters, 2.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $9,808,743

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 23rd, 2024 (Wide) by Lionsgate
August 23rd, 2024 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: August 21st, 2024 (Wide) (France)
August 22nd, 2024 (Wide), released as El Cuervo (Mexico)
August 22nd, 2024 (Wide), released as O Corvo (Portugal)
August 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Netherlands)
August 22nd, 2024 (Wide), released as Vrana (Slovakia)
Video Release: September 13th, 2024 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, gore, language, sexuality/nudity, and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2840 (cert #54901), 6/26/2024)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Reboot, Remake
Filming location (country): Czech Republic, Germany
Plot point: Death of a Girlfriend / Boyfriend, Gangs, Revenge
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Media Capital Technologies
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
